fato_historico: 1982: In one of the first militant attacks by Hezbollah, David S. Dodge, president of the American University of Beirut, is kidnapped.
energia_do_dia: Today may bring a gentle reminder of how fragile yet precious freedom and communication truly are. Just as stories of resilience emerge from the shadows of history, consider how your own voice can bridge divides. It is a good time to cultivate empathy and listen deeply to the diverse perspectives surrounding your path today.
frase_do_dia: Your words possess the unique power to weave peace into a busy world.
significado_numero: Represents the manifestation of independent thought and spiritual autonomy.
conselho: Practice active listening to strengthen the bonds within your social circle today.
